steps.title: Enumerate AI Endpoints
steps.text: Attacker discovers exposed GenAI/LLM API endpoints (/v1/chat/completions, /api/generate) through API documentation or directory brute-forcing.

steps.title: DAN Jailbreak Prompt Injection
steps.text: Attacker sends DAN (Do Anything Now) jailbreak payloads to bypass system prompt restrictions and extract internal instructions from the LLM.

steps.title: Prompt Injection Alert Fires
steps.text: Sigma/KQL/Wazuh rules detect injection patterns in HTTP POST body. Wazuh rule 101201 triggers Level 12 alert. CLAW playbook initiates triage.

steps.title: Extract Credentials via Crafted Queries
steps.text: Using knowledge from prompt extraction, attacker crafts queries that cause the LLM to leak database credentials (password: Pr0dDB!Secret2025) and AWS access keys (AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE) in responses.

steps.title: Data Leakage Alert & Containment
steps.text: Data exfiltration rules detect sensitive patterns (AWS keys, private keys) in LLM responses. Wazuh rule 101202 fires at Level 13. CLAW data-exfil playbook disables endpoint and initiates credential rotation.

steps.title: Distribute Backdoored Model on Hugging Face
steps.text: Attacker publishes a trojaned model (backdoor-llama-7b) on Hugging Face with malicious pickle payload that executes reverse shell on torch.load().

steps.title: Data Scientist Downloads Poisoned Model
steps.text: Internal data scientist clones the trojan model and loads it with weights_only=False, triggering embedded reverse shell via pickle deserialization.

steps.title: Supply Chain Compromise Detection
steps.text: Sigma rule detects untrusted model download + unsafe loading pattern. Wazuh rule 101203 fires. CrowdStrike IOA detects AI framework process spawning shell commands.

steps.title: LLMjacking - Massive Unauthorized Inference
steps.text: Using stolen API credentials from Phase 2, attacker runs 2,847 unauthorized inference requests per hour across 8 models, consuming $462 in compute costs.

steps.title: Resource Abuse Detection & Full Containment
steps.text: KQL anomaly detection identifies 3-sigma deviation in API consumption. Wazuh rule 101204 frequency alert triggers. SOAR orchestration revokes API keys, blocks source IPs, and initiates full incident response.
